failure.message: Tap on "View all" did not complete

testcase.name: Input text: "Biz module create post test"
Input text: "Sharing a community image upload test"

failure.message: Assert visible: "Welcome to Learn" did not complete

testcase.name: Confirm the login heading is shown
Confirm the login subheading is shown
Confirm the email field is shown
Confirm the password field is shown
Confirm the forgot-password link is shown
Confirm the Log in button is shown
Confirm the alternate-login divider is shown
Confirm the Google login option is shown
Confirm the sign-up link is shown
Confirm the email field is still shown
Confirm the password field is still shown
Confirm we are still on the login screen

failure.message: Tap the show-password toggle did not complete

testcase.name: Type an email with no @ symbol
Tap Log in with the invalid email
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type an email with no domain after @
Tap Log in with the invalid email
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type an email with no top-level domain
Tap Log in with the invalid email
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type an email containing a space
Tap Log in with the invalid email
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type an email with a double @ symbol
Tap Log in with the invalid email
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type a valid email to confirm the field recovers
Confirm the valid email is shown
Tap Log in with both fields empty
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm the login screen heading is shown
Confirm we did not log in
Type an email, leave password empty
Tap Log in with only an email entered
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in
Type a password, leave email empty
Tap Log in with only a password entered
Confirm still on the login screen
Confirm we did not log in

failure.message: Tap the email field did not complete

testcase.name: Confirm the typed email is shown
Confirm the old email is gone
Type an email with a plus-tag and subdomain
Confirm the special-character email is shown
Type a very long but valid email address
Confirm the long email is shown
Type one more email to confirm the field still accepts input
Confirm the final email is shown
Confirm the placeholder text is restored at the end
